'''''UFC 293: Adesanya vs. Strickland''''' was a [[mixed martial arts]] event produced by the [[Ultimate Fighting Championship]] that took place on September 10, 2023, at the [[Qudos Bank Arena]] in [[Sydney]], Australia.<ref name="Sydney">{{cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2023/05/ufc-293-sydney-australia-pay-per-view|title=UFC 293 heads to Sydney, Australia as first event of new four-year New South Wales deal|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Nolan King|date=2023-05-17|access-date=2023-05-17}}</ref>

==Background==
The event marked the promotion's sixth visit to Sydney and first since [[UFC Fight Night: Werdum vs. Tybura]] in November 2017.<ref name="Sydney" />

A [[UFC Middleweight Championship]] bout between current two-time champion [[Israel Adesanya]] and [[Sean Strickland]] headlined the event.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2023/8/8/23822224/israel-adesanya-vs-sean-strickland-headlines-ufc-293-in-sydney|title=Israel Adesanya vs. Sean Strickland headlines UFC 293 in Sydney|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Shaun Al-Shatti|date=2023-08-08|access-date=2023-08-08}}</ref> Former title challenger [[Jared Cannonier]] served as backup and potential replacement for this fight.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2023/09/ufc-293-jared-cannonier-backup-fighter-israel-adesanya-vs-sean-strickland-title-fight|title=Jared Cannonier in Sydney as UFC 293 backup for Israel Adesanya vs. Sean Strickland title fight|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Mike Bohn|date=2023-09-04|access-date=2023-09-04}}</ref>

A women's flyweight bout between [[Casey O'Neill]] and [[Viviane Araújo (fighter)|Viviane Araújo]] was expected to take place at this event.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2023/6/9/23754861/viviane-araujo-casey-oneill-ufc-293-australia|title=Viviane Araujo vs. Casey O'Neill booked for UFC 293 in Australia|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Guilherme Cruz|date=2023-06-09|access-date=2023-06-09}}</ref> However, O'Neill pulled out due to injury and was replaced by [[Jennifer Maia]], with the new matchup being pushed back to [[UFC Fight Night: Yusuff vs. Barboza]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2023/08/ufc-293-news-casey-oneill-out-viviane-araujo-now-face-jennifer-maia-oct-14-flyweight|title=With Casey O'Neill out of UFC 293, Viviane Araujo will now face Jennifer Maia on Oct. 14|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Farah Hannoun, Mike Bohn and Nolan King|date=2023-08-08|access-date=2023-08-08}}</ref>

A flyweight bout between former interim [[UFC Flyweight Championship]] challenger [[Kai Kara-France]] and former [[Rizin Fighting Federation#Bantamweight Championship|Rizin Bantamweight Champion]] [[Manel Kape]] was expected to take place at the event.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmamania.com/2023/6/20/23766888/kai-kara-france-lands-ufc-australia-fight-against-manel-kape|title=Kai Kara-France lands UFC Australia fight against Manel Kape|publisher=mmamania.com|author=Ryan Harkness|date=2023-06-20|access-date=2023-08-21}}</ref> However, Kara-France withdrew after sustaining a [[concussion]]  in training.<ref name="KKF out">{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/platform/amp/2023/8/21/23840654/manel-kape-new-opponent-ufc-293-newcomer-felipe-dos-santos-dwcs|title=Kai Kara-France drops out of UFC 293 fight against Manel Kape after suffering concussion|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Damon Martin|date=2023-08-21|access-date=2023-08-21}}</ref> He was replaced by promotional newcomer Felipe dos Santos.<ref name="FDS">{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2023/8/21/23839721/kai-kara-france-drops-out-of-ufc-293-fight-against-manel-kape-after-suffering-concussion|title=Manel Kape gets new opponent for UFC 293, faces newcomer Felipe dos Santos|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Guilherme Cruz|date=2023-08-21|access-date=2023-08-21}}</ref>

A lightweight bout between [[Nasrat Haqparast]] and Sam Patterson was expected to take place the week prior at [[UFC Fight Night: Gane vs. Spivak]].<ref>{{Cite web |author=<!--Unlisted--> |date=2023-07-26 |title=Nasrat Haqparast Faces Sam Patterson Set for UFC Paris Event |url=https://www.itnwwe.com/mma/nasrat-haqparast-faces-sam-patterson-set-for-ufc-paris-event/ |access-date=2023-08-29 |website=www.itnwwe.com |language=en-US}}</ref> However, Patterson pulled out due to health issues.<ref>{{cite web|title=Sam Patterson is Out of UFC Paris Event with Health Issues|url=https://www.itnwwe.com/mma/sam-patterson-is-out-of-ufc-paris-event/|website=ITN WWE|access-date=23 August 2023 |language=en |date=9 August 2023}}</ref> A replacement was found in promotional newcomer, Landon Quinones, who had previously competed on [[The Ultimate Fighter: Team McGregor vs. Team Chandler|Season 31 of The Ultimate Fighter]] earlier in the year, and the pairing was moved to this event.<ref>{{Cite web |last=Anderson |first=Jay |date=2023-08-23 |title=Nasrat Haqparast Booked Against Landon Quinones at UFC 293 Next Month |url=https://cagesidepress.com/2023/08/23/nasrat-haqparast-booked-landon-quinones/ |access-date=2023-08-29 |website=Cageside Press |language=en-US}}</ref>

At the weigh-ins, [[Shane Young]] weighed in at 149.75 pounds, three and three-quarters pounds over the featherweight non-title fight limit. His bout proceeded at catchweight and he was fined 30% of his purse, which went to his opponent Gabriel Miranda.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/platform/amp/2023/9/8/23864134/ufc-293-weigh-in-results-israel-adesanya-sean-strickland-hit-mark-1-fighter-misses-almost-4-pounds|title=UFC 293 weigh-in results: Israel Adesanya and Sean Strickland hit mark, 1 fighter misses by almost 4 pounds|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Alexander K. Lee|date=2023-09-08|access-date=2023-09-08}}</ref>

==Bonus awards==
The following fighters received $50,000 bonuses.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.bjpenn.com/mma-news/sean-strickland/ufc-293-bonus-report-sean-strickland-one-of-four-fighters-to-take-home-50k/|title=UFC 293 bonus report: Sean Strickland one of four fighters to take home $50k|publisher=bjpenn.com|author=Chris Taylor|date=2023-09-09|access-date=2023-09-09}}</ref>
*'''Fight of the Night: Manel Kape vs. Felipe dos Santos'''
*'''Performance of the Night: Sean Strickland''' and '''Justin Tafa'''
